all.en: Last weekend, my college friends and I went on a long-awaited hiking trip to Yushan.
all.zh: 上週末，我和大學朋友們進行了一趟期待已久的玉山健行之旅。

all.en: Yushan is the highest mountain in Taiwan and attracts hikers from all over the world.
all.zh: 玉山是台灣最高的山，吸引了來自世界各地的登山客。

all.en: We applied for permits three months in advance because access is strictly limited.
all.zh: 我們提前三個月申請了入山許可證，因為入山管制非常嚴格。

all.en: The journey started at dawn, when the temperature was already quite cold.
all.zh: 我們的旅程從黎明時分開始，當時氣溫已經相當寒冷了。

all.en: Carrying heavy backpacks, we slowly climbed up steep stone steps through the forest.
all.zh: 我們背著沉重的背包，在森林中沿著陡峭的石階緩慢向上攀登。

all.en: Halfway up, we stopped at a wooden cabin to rest and eat instant noodles.
all.zh: 爬到一半時，我們在一間木屋停下來休息並吃了泡麵。

all.en: The air became thinner as we climbed higher, and some of us felt slightly dizzy.
all.zh: 隨著海拔越來越高，空氣也變得稀薄，我們有些人感到輕微的頭暈。

all.en: When we finally reached the summit, an ocean of clouds stretched out beneath our feet.
all.zh: 當我們終於抵達山頂時，一片雲海在我們腳下延展開來。

all.en: The sunrise painted the sky in shades of pink, orange and gold.
all.zh: 日出將天空染成了粉紅、橘色和金色的色調。

all.en: Nobody spoke for several minutes because the view was almost too beautiful for words.
all.zh: 有好幾分鐘大家都沒有說話，因為這景色美得幾乎無法用言語形容。

all.en: On the way down, our knees ached badly, but our hearts were full of joy.
all.zh: 下山的路上，我們的膝蓋疼痛不已，但內心卻充滿了喜悅。

all.en: That sunrise will remain one of the most unforgettable memories of my entire life.
all.zh: 那次的日出將永遠是我這一生中最難忘的回憶之一。
